expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
expectations.evidence: The review contains 3 focused issues but no advisory about the large scope or suggestion to split the PR.
Finding #3 explicitly discusses 'UmbDeprecation.warn()' firing on every connectedCallback and references the deprecated modal elements.

expectations.text: Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag the alias renames (CreateOptions -> Create) as breaking changes. It discusses additionalOptions semantics and UmbDeprecation patterns but misses the critical manifest alias breaking change.

expectations.text: Findings reference specific files with line numbers
expectations.evidence: All findings include specific file paths with line references, e.g. 'language/entity-actions/create/default/manifests.ts:14'.

expectations.text: Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: No deprecated code is flagged as a Critical breaking change. The review discusses UmbDeprecation patterns as a code quality concern, not a breaking change.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All three findings are about functional/behavioral issues (incorrect additionalOptions flags, incorrect ellipsis, repeated deprecation warnings), not cosmetic issues.

expectations.text: Alias renames (CreateOptions -> Create) flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: The alias renames from CreateOptions to Create are not mentioned at all in the review.

expectations.text: Deleted action classes NOT flagged as breaking (verified against package.json exports)
expectations.evidence: No deleted classes are flagged as breaking. The review does not mention deleted action classes.

expectations.text: Flags UiBaseLocators.ts as formatting changes mixed with functional changes
expectations.evidence: UiBaseLocators.ts is not mentioned in the review.

expectations.text: Does not review noise files (generated files, lock files, etc.)
expectations.evidence: The review focuses only on source files. No generated or noise files are referenced.
